# Outputs Directory

This directory contains generated output files from SAP discovery processes.

Output files (*.xlsx, *.csv, *.json) are automatically ignored by git (see `.gitignore`).

## Generated Files

- `sap_process_mappings.xlsx` - Excel export of discovery results
- Other generated reports and mappings

## Usage

Users can export their discovery results to Excel files using the "export to excel" command in the chat interface.
